name: JavaScript
description: Foundational language across all projects. Built the Unified Content Dashboard entirely in vanilla JS — manual state management, re-rendering, and algorithm design without any framework abstractions.

name: TypeScript
description: Primary language in the AI portfolio project. Strict mode enforced throughout — typed API routes, component props, database rows, and environment variables.

name: React
description: Core UI library across multiple projects including Shop Me, Car Rental, and EduHelp. Component architecture, hooks, and lifecycle management.

name: Next.js
description: App Router, co-located API routes, and server components — used in the AI portfolio project. Focus on the API route layer as the server-side boundary for all AI and database calls.

name: TailwindCSS
description: Utility-first styling across Shop Me, Car Rental, and the AI portfolio. Used alongside shadcn/ui for a production-quality component system.

name: Redux / Redux Toolkit
description: State management in Shop Me and Car Rental — slices, async thunks, and store architecture.

name: HTML & CSS
description: Foundation of the Unified Content Dashboard — semantic HTML structure, custom CSS for the vintage aesthetic, and layout without any framework.

name: Python
description: Primary language for EduHelp — the full AI-powered RAG assistant backend was built in Python.

name: Node.js
description: Backend API routes in the AI portfolio project — contact form, chat endpoint, and feedback logging.

name: RAG Pipelines
description: Implemented full RAG pipelines in both EduHelp and the AI portfolio — covering chunking strategy, embedding generation, vector retrieval, grounded synthesis, and source citation.

name: Gemini API
description: Used for embeddings (text-embedding-004) and LLM responses (Gemini 2.5 Flash) in the AI portfolio. Both calls handled server-side via Next.js API routes.

name: Supabase / pgvector
description: Vector store for Proxenos embeddings and feedback logging in the AI portfolio. Row-level security configured to separate public read operations from service-role writes.

name: Git / GitHub
description: Version control across all projects. Conventional commits, feature branching, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD and automated embed pipeline.

name: Cloudflare Workers
description: Deployment target for the AI portfolio via the OpenNext adapter. Global edge delivery with unlimited bandwidth on the free tier.

name: GitHub Actions
description: CI/CD pipeline for the AI portfolio — auto-deploy to Cloudflare Workers on push to main, and automated embed script trigger on content changes.
